specific_question: What percentage of leads are generated through digital channels, and how has that changed from 2024-2025?
answer: According to Sales Team reports, in October 2025, 82% of all new leads are generated through digital channels, including paid search and social media. This represents an increase of 18% since Q1 of 2024.
dr_question: By the end of 2025, how can Elexion Automotive use data generated through its customer relationship management system to analyze customer behavior online and identify patterns that drive sales?
